description: CSV output format works correctly for all CLI subcommands
steps: event_to_csv_row(&BrowserEvent) -> String produces exactly 5 comma-separated fields
csv_escape() wraps values containing commas or double-quotes in double-quotes, escapes internal double-quotes by doubling
format_timestamp_ns(ns: i64) -> String returns a valid RFC3339 datetime string
Unit test: format_timestamp_ns_is_rfc3339 — result contains 'T' and ends with Z or offset
Unit test: event_to_csv_row_has_five_fields — split by comma count >= 5
CLI integration: bw timeline --format csv <chrome_history_file> first line contains 'timestamp,browser,artifact'
